title: Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters
text:
Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

# Michał Nowak

## Senior Vice President, Engineering

Michał runs SmartRecruiters’ engineering function and is responsible for software development, infrastructure, and security.

Michał spent the last 15 years building distributed systems and managing engineering teams in various industries. He joined SmartRecruiter in 2012 as one of the first employees and helped scale the platform to support the needs of some of the largest enterprises in the world.

He is passionate about creating engineering organizations where teams are empowered to deliver business outcomes.

Michal has a Master’s in Computer Science from Jagiellonian University.

# Michał Nowak

## Senior VP, Technik

Michał leitet die technische Abteilung von SmartRecruiters und ist verantwortlich für Softwareentwicklung, Infrastruktur und Sicherheit.

Michał hat die letzten 15 Jahre damit verbracht, verteilte Systeme aufzubauen und Ingenieurteams in verschiedenen Branchen zu leiten. Er kam 2012 als einer der ersten Mitarbeiter zu SmartRecruiter und half bei der Skalierung der Plattform, um die Anforderungen einiger der größten Unternehmen der Welt zu erfüllen.

Seine Leidenschaft ist es, technische Organisationen zu schaffen, in denen Teams befähigt werden, Geschäftsergebnisse zu erzielen.

Michal hat einen Master-Abschluss in Informatik von der Jagiellonen-Universität.

title: How RebelDot Automated Tasks to Personalize Recruitment | Teamtailor
text:
How RebelDot Automated Tasks to Personalize Recruitment | Teamtailor

Nov 6, 2024

# How RebelDot Automated Tasks to Personalize Recruitment

Oana Groza and Alex Laslau, People & Culture Business Partner's at RebelDot, shared how they prioritize a personal approach to recruitment to attract and retain top talent in the tech industry.

Valentina Behrouzi

I'm Val, one of the Marketing Managers here at Teamtailor, responsible for our Global marketing. I love talking about candidate experience and how we can strive to make hiring more inclusive.

RebelDot is a tech company, focused on bringing digital ideas to life and specializing in custom software development, crafting mobile and web apps, and designing intuitive user experiences. Based in Cluj-Napoca, Romania, with offices in Oradea and Copenhagen, their team is all about collaboration and working closely with their clients to create solutions that truly fit their needs.

RebelDot is focused on more than just delivering software, but building meaningful digital products that truly solve problems that make a difference to their clients, allowing them to deliver tailored solutions that not only work, but exceed expectations.

> Teamtailor is a platform that continuously improves and upgrades its features to ensure it stays ahead of industry trends and meets the evolving needs of recruiters.

The team at RebelDot

## Meet Oana and Alex

As a People & Culture specialist with nearly five years of experience, Oana passionate about connecting with others and fostering a vibrant workplace. She thrives on social interactions and bringing the right talent into RebelDot.

Alex has over 10 years experience in HR, focused on recruitment and performance management. He is passionate about building and growing teams, with a data-driven approach to make it happen.

### What are some of the hiring trends and challenges that are unique to tech?

In the tech industry, particularly in software development, the demand for specialized sk

title: Shiran Yaroslavsky | SmartRecruiters
text:
Shiran Yaroslavsky | SmartRecruiters

# Shiran Yaroslavsky

## Senior VP, Product

Shiran ist Senior Vice President für den Bereich Produkte bei SmartRecruiters. Mit einem umfangreichen Hintergrund in Produktführung und Unternehmertum in der HR-Technologie hat Shiran eine Erfolgsbilanz bei der Verwaltung großer Produkte und funktionsübergreifender globaler Teams.

Bevor sie zu SmartRecruiters kam, war Shiran bei HiBob als VP of Product in leitender Funktion tätig und war Chief Executive Officer und Mitbegründerin von Cassiopeia, einem Unternehmen, das sie erfolgreich bis zu seiner Übernahme durch HiBob führte.

Für ihre Leistungen wurde sie in die Forbes 30Under30-Liste 2019 aufgenommen. Shiran hat einen Bachelor- und einen Master-Abschluss in Jura (beide Cum Laude) und einen MBA von der University of Chicago Booth School of Business.

title: "Feeling Like a Winner": How ESTO is Humanizing FinTech Recruitment | Teamtailor
text:
"Feeling Like a Winner": How ESTO is Humanizing FinTech Recruitment | Teamtailor

Jan 30, 2026

# "Feeling Like a Winner": How ESTO is Humanizing FinTech Recruitment

Nadezda Muttonen, Regita Kumel, and Triin Kimer, People & Culture Team, ESTO

Discover how Regita Kumel and the ESTO team are proving that lightning-fast recruitment can still feel incredibly personal, creating a 21-day hiring journey where every candidate - hired or not - walks away feeling like a winner.

Aram Winkler

Marketing Manager DACH & Benelux

In the high-stakes world of FinTech, the Baltic company ESTO stands out - not just for its record-breaking revenue growth, but for its approach to the people behind the numbers. Headquartered in Tallinn, ESTO has grown into a 100-person powerhouse by connecting 6,000+ merchants with innovative consumer finance solutions. But as any fast-growth company knows, scaling the business requires scaling the team and culture.

We sat down with Regita Kumel, Talent & Employer Branding Manager at ESTO, to discuss how they moved away from modules that didn't keep up with the companies fast growth, to embrace a recruitment process that is as intuitive and data-driven as the financial products they build.

Talent & Employer Branding Manager, ESTO

## Meet Regita Kumel

Regita is the Talent & Employer Branding Manager at ESTO, bringing a wealth of experience from both HR agencies and in-house roles at high-growth companies. Specializing in the Fintech, e-commerce, and service sectors, she focuses on bridging the gap between strategic recruitment and authentic employer branding.

### The Need for a Centralized Hub

Teamtailor: Before Teamtailor, what were the "growing pains" in your recruitment process?

Regita: We were using a basic recruitment module, but it lacked the centralization we needed. Managers couldn’t independently track their own processes, and we didn’t have a way to build a long-term talent pool. We needed a platform that was flexible and intuitive - s

title: Preparing for the EU Pay Transparency Directive | Teamtailor
text:
Preparing for the EU Pay Transparency Directive | Teamtailor

Jul 2, 2025

# Preparing for the EU Pay Transparency Directive

We're joined by Daniel Edenholm, founder of Sysarb to break down the upcoming EU Pay Transparency Directive and how it will reshape the way we look at salaries. This episode covers what the 2026 Directive means for recruiters and HR teams alike, and how to prepare.

Valentina Behrouzi

I'm Val, one of the Marketing Managers here at Teamtailor, responsible for our Global marketing. I love talking about candidate experience and how we can strive to make hiring more inclusive.

The EU Pay Transparency Directive represents a significant shift in the European employment landscape. It’s coming into effect in 2026, but it’s important for companies to be prepared in advance. We spoke with Daniel Edenholm, founder of Sysarb to find out what this new directive means for recruitment.

### What Is the EU Pay Transparency Directive?

The EU Pay Transparency Directive has been created to decrease the significant gender pay gap. Taking effect by June 5th 2026, it will enforce transparency in how salaries are structured and communicated internally and externally.

Some of the changes that come with the Directive:

- Employers will need to publicly present average pay gaps
- Job ads are required to include salary ranges
- Employers must develop structured salary bands to justify pay levels
- Employers will no longer be allowed to ask candidates about salary history.

> So, when you as an employer present a job ad, you have to describe the pay range. And that's a new step for many countries

### What does this mean for recruitment?

The changes coming into place will have a significant impact on the way we hire. Some of the biggest changes employers and hiring teams need to prepare for are:

- Salary transparency begins even earlier: Salary ranges must be structured, justified and clear before publishing roles, as they will need to be visible within the job de

title: DevITJobs.uk - Business Job Ad (30 Days) | Integrations | Teamtailor
text:
DevITJobs.uk - Business Job Ad (30 Days) | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Integraatiomme tuovat supervoimaa rekrytointiisi

## DevITJobs.uk - Business Job Ad (30 Days)

DevITJobs is the only fully transparent UK job board, built by engineers to attract qualified, active tech talent. With over 20,000 monthly visitors, an average of 35 applicants per job, and no time limits on listings, we help you hire efficiently and effectively. Trusted by over 900 UK companies and rated 4.5 out of 5, we promote your roles across social media, newsletters, and tech-focused channels to deliver real results.

If you want your job ad to be published, please send us a short email to hello@devitjobs.uk to purchase the job ad.

At DevITJobs.uk, we understand what matters to you: reaching qualified tech professionals efficiently, without wasting time or budget.

We are the only transparent IT job board in the UK – built by engineers, for engineers – and designed to attract serious applicants who are actively looking. Over 20,000 tech talents visit our site monthly, generating an average of 35 qualified applicants per job offer.

Your job posting stays active until you hire, with promotion across LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, and a newsletter to 4,500+ subscribers. Our team also optimizes each listing to ensure maximum visibility and relevance.

We’ve helped over 900 companies, including Metro Bank, UK Home Office, and McLaren, fill more than 2200 positions. Rated 4.5/5.0 on Trustpilot and recognized in other countries: #1 IT job board in Switzerland by Handelszeitung & Statista, we’re a trusted partner for companies that need results.

DevITJobs isn’t just for Developers – we support roles across the IT spectrum: Engineers, System and SAP Admins, Product Managers, QAs, UX/UI Designers, and more.

Let’s help you hire faster and smarter.

Contact: hello@devitjobs.uk Support article: Read more about this package

title: Remotive | Integrations | Teamtailor
text:
Remotive | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Supercharge your recruitment with our integrations

## Remotive

Remotive is the first community-driven remote job board. Make your ad cut through the noise, speak directly to the remote candidates that matter for your role.

Remotive is the first community-driven remote job board. Make your ad cut through the noise, speak directly to the remote candidates that matter for your role. For promotion at no cost, the remotive team curates remote jobs ad-hoc, picking relevant jobs to highlight depending on our audience needs and our editorial schedules. Note that your jobs won't be posted by default, we can only guarantee the publication of paid jobs.

## Remotive

Remotive is the first community-driven remote job board. Make your ad cut through the noise, speak directly to the remote candidates that matter for your role.

Remotive is the first community-driven remote job board. Make your ad cut through the noise, speak directly to the remote candidates that matter for your role. For promotion at no cost, the remotive team curates remote jobs ad-hoc, picking relevant jobs to highlight depending on our audience needs and our editorial schedules. Note that your jobs won't be posted by default, we can only guarantee the publication of paid jobs.

title: Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters
text:
Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

# Michał Nowak

## Premier vice-président, Ingénierie

Michał dirige la fonction d’ingénierie de SmartRecruiters et est responsable du développement de logiciels, de l’infrastructure et de la sécurité.

Michał a passé les 15 dernières années à construire des systèmes distribués et à gérer des équipes d’ingénieurs dans diverses industries. Il a rejoint SmartRecruiter en 2012 comme l’un des premiers employés et a aidé à faire évoluer la plateforme pour répondre aux besoins de certaines des plus grandes entreprises du monde.

Il est passionné par la création d’organisations d’ingénierie où les équipes sont habilitées à produire des résultats commerciaux.

Michal est titulaire d’une maîtrise en informatique de l’université Jagiellonian.

title: How Knauf transformed its global recruitment with Teamtailor
text:
How Knauf transformed its global recruitment with Teamtailor

Feb 26, 2026

# How Knauf Transformed its Global Recruitment for 43,000 Employees

Bridging tradition and technology: The Global Recruitment team is bringing Knauf’s 90-year history into the digital age

Discover how James Forster, Global Recruitment Lead at Knauf, steered a two-year digital transformation to unify recruitment for 43,500 employees, ultimately driving a 50% increase in applicant volume while bridging the gap between a 90-year legacy and modern talent acquisition.

Aram Winkler

Marketing Manager DACH & Benelux

Knauf is a global leader in the building materials industry - a 90-year-old, family-owned powerhouse. But as their factories became "smarter" and their sales processes went digital, their recruitment process faced a challenge: it was stuck in a decentralized, manual past.

We spoke with James Forster, Global Recruitment Lead at the Knauf Group People Team, about how he navigated this complex transformation. His goal? To move from a fragmented "black box" of local processes to a unified, "best-in-class" global engine.

## Why Change was needed

Question: How would you describe Knauf’s recruitment philosophy? In an industry as established as yours, how do you balance "tradition" with the need for modern talent acquisition?

James Forster: "Our recruitment philosophy centres on two pillars: we deliver a best-in-class candidate experience—clear, timely communication; transparency, fair, inclusive evaluation; and respectful closure for every applicant. We also equip our people with a robust, data-enabled hiring system that empowers both candidates and colleagues to identify, assess, and secure best-in-class talent, consistently and at scale. Historically one of the last to embrace digitalisation, our sector is now moving quickly. We seek people who are technologically fluent but also thrive within a family-owned, values-led environment. Our process should mirror the organisation we are b

title: RebelDot heeft handmatige processen vervangen door een gepersonaliseerde benadering van recruitment | Teamtailor
text:
RebelDot heeft handmatige processen vervangen door een gepersonaliseerde benadering van recruitment | Teamtailor

22 apr 2025

Klantverhalen

# RebelDot heeft handmatige processen vervangen door een gepersonaliseerde benadering van recruitment

Oana Groza en Alex Laslau, People & Culture Business Partner bij Rebel Dot, deelden hoe zij prioriteit geven aan een persoonlijke benadering van recruitment om toptalent in de technologiesector aan te trekken en te behouden.

Valentina Behrouzi

Ik ben Val, een van de Marketing Managers hier bij Teamtailor, verantwoordelijk voor de Britse markt. Ik praat graag over de kandidaatervaring en hoe we een meer inclusieve werving en selectie kunnen bereiken.

RebelDot is a tech company, focused on bringing digital ideas to life and specializing in custom software development, crafting mobile and web apps, and designing intuitive user experiences. Hun team is gevestigd in Cluj-Napoca, Roemenië, met kantoren in Oradea en Kopenhagen en hecht veel waarde aan samenwerking met hun klanten om oplossingen te creëren die echt aansluiten bij hun behoeften.

RebelDot richt zich niet alleen op het leveren van software, maar ook op het bouwen van betekenisvolle digitale producten die daadwerkelijk problemen oplossen en een verschil maken voor hun klanten. Op deze manier kunnen ze oplossingen op maat leveren die niet alleen werken, maar ook de verwachtingen overtreffen.

> Teamtailor is een platform dat voortdurend zijn functies verbetert en bijwerkt om ervoor te zorgen dat het de trends in de sector voor blijft en voldoet aan de veranderende behoeften van recruiters.

Het team bij RebelDot

## Maak kennis met Oana en Alex

Oana is een People & Culture-specialist met bijna vijf jaar ervaring en heeft een passie voor het aangaan van relaties met mensen en het stimuleren van een dynamische werkomgeving. Ze geniet van sociale interacties en het juiste talent naar RebelDot brengen.

Alex heeft meer dan 10 jaar ervaring in HR en is gespecialiseerd in

title: Robert Symons | SmartRecruiters
text:
Robert Symons | SmartRecruiters

# Robert Symons

## VP, Partnerships und Development

Ein Verfechter der HCM-Cloud-Software. Leidenschaftlich dabei, Unternehmen dabei zu helfen, die Art und Weise, wie sie Top-Talente anwerben, einstellen und binden, zu verändern. 22 Jahre Erfahrung auf dem Recruiting-Markt. Zuvor 9 Jahre lang Skalierung eines HCM-Softwareunternehmens von 11 Mitarbeitern auf über 700 Mitarbeiter als Teil des Führungsteams. Im Jahr 2016 kam er zu SmartRecruiters als erster Vertriebs- und Marketingmitarbeiter in Europa mit Verantwortung für Großbritannien/Nordeuropa. Als EVP, Sales, beaufsichtigt Robert unsere globalen Account Executives, Sales Development, Pre-Sales und Partnerschaften Teams.

title: Customer Success Story - Riikka Lintukangas, Vincit | Teamtailor
text:
Customer Success Story - Riikka Lintukangas, Vincit | Teamtailor

3. marrask. 2023

# Customer Success Story - Riikka Lintukangas, Vincit

Jessica Chu

Hi I'm Jessica, Marketing Manager of the Nordics. Company culture and AI in recruitment are just a few of my favourite topics to read and write about.

Tapasimme Riikka Lintukankaan Vincitiltä, kuka työskentelee heidän rekrytointien ja rekrymarkkinoinnin parissa. Haastattelussa Riikka avasi muun muassa Vincitille tärkeitä teemoja rekrytoinnin kehittämisestä ja kuinka Teamtailor on tätä matkaa tukenut.

Vincitillä on käynnissä useampia rekrytointiin liittyviä projekteja, joista yksi tärkeimmistä on hakijakokemuksen kehittäminen entisestään.

Syyt miksi juuri Teamtailor tuntui Vincitille oikealta kumppanilta lähteä kehittämään rekrytointia, oli useampia:

- Aktiivinen asiakaspalvelu
- Data ja Analytiikka
- Talent Pool toiminto

Kun talent pool on “mintissä“, ei välttämättä aina tarvitse lähteä toteuttamaan suorahakua tai avaamaan uutta rekryä. Data ja analytiikka on Vincitille erityisen tärkeässä osassa rekrymarkkinnoinnin kanssa ja nopea asiakaspalvelu jäi mieleen jo yhteistyön alusta asti.

Teamtailor on mahdollistanut Vincitille paljon uusia tapoja toimia rekrytointien kanssa. Yksi olennainen osa on ollut muun muassa keinot tehdä sujuvasti yhteistyötä esihenkilöiden kanssa.

Riikan mielestä Teamtailor sopii erityisesti sellaisille yrityksille, jotka ovat erityisen ylpeitä omasta rekrytointityöstään ja hakijakokemuksestaan. Toisaalta myös sellaisille, ketkä haluavat olla alansa kärkipäässä ottamassa uusia työkaluja käyttöön.

### Hoxhunt säästi lähes 10 000 euroa ja rakensi entistä inhimillisemmän hakijakokemuksen

### Uusi EU-direktiivi tuo muutoksia henkilöstöhallintoon vuonna 2026 – tärkeää tietoa

### Biisoni: Ihminen etusijalla – rekrytoinnin jokaisessa vaiheessa

- 12. kesäk. 2025Biisoni on rekrytointi- ja henkilöstövuokrausyritys, jonka juuret ovat Suomessa – mutta sen toimintamalli puhuttelee yrityksiä ympäri

title: From job descriptions to interview kits: How Co-pilot optimized LUKOWA’s hiring process | Teamtailor
text:
From job descriptions to interview kits: How Co-pilot optimized LUKOWA’s hiring process | Teamtailor

 

 

Nov 19, 2024

Customer Stories

# From job descriptions to interview kits: How Co-pilot optimized LUKOWA’s hiring process

We spoke with Aleksandar Stankovic, Senior Talent Manager at LUKOWA Group to gain more insight into how they're using our AI Co-pilot feature to save time and streamline their recruitment process.

Lia Ianora

Founded in 1983, LUKOWA Group has grown from a Swiss-based food producer into a global conglomerate spanning the food, technology, real estate, wealth management, and entertainment sectors. Renowned for its speed, efficiency, and commitment to quality, LUKOWA serves market-leading clients and partners across 28 countries.

With over 500 employees and 12 diverse businesses, LUKOWA is a significant player in the global food and beverage industry while continuously expanding into new industries. Guided by a pioneering spirit and a focus on excellence, LUKOWA strives to empower people to live smarter, happier, and more sustainable lives.

> Co-pilot has transformed how we work, freeing up time for more meaningful tasks and improving the quality of our recruitment process

Senior Talent Manager at LUKOWA Group

## Meet Aleksandar Stankovic

As a Head-hunter and People & Culture Manager at LUKOWA Group, I oversee recruitment across various departments, having successfully recruited 42 individuals last year alone. I also manage initiatives that enhance employee well-being, including private health insurance, Fitpass, and corporate basketball. With my expertise in finance, administration, logistics, and AI-driven recruitment tools like Teamtailor, I strive to align talent with LUKOWA’s unique corporate culture, creating a thriving environment for both our employees and the business.

### What is Co-pilot?

Co-pilot is powered by the same OpenAI API that ChatGPT uses, designed to help streamline recruitment processes. It consists of a suite o

title: Mastering tech recruitment | Teamtailor
text:
Mastering tech recruitment | Teamtailor

Jun 19, 2025

# Mastering tech recruitment

Valentina Behrouzi

I'm Val, one of the Marketing Managers here at Teamtailor, responsible for our Global marketing. I love talking about candidate experience and how we can strive to make hiring more inclusive.

In our latest episode of Happy Recruiting, we spoke with Diana Rose, Talent Acquisition Specialist at Boozt, for an in-depth conversation on tech recruiting. Why is there such a high demand, why is tech recruiting so unique and where does candidate experience come in? We break down some of the key takeaways below!

### The demand for tech talent

Tech now touches every industry, whether it’s healthcare or e-commerce, the growing demand for tech professionals is fueled by digital transformation, AI, data, and the need for cross-functional skills. Businesses are no longer just interested in purely technical expertise. They expect their developers, engineers and product managers to understand the goals and strategies of the business.

> It's not just about technical skills anymore. Companies want professionals who can bridge tech and business.

### Why is tech recruiting so unique?

Diana stresses the importance of recruiters hiring for tech roles needing a deep understanding of how technology is evolving, unlike some traditional recruitment methods. Recruiters must be data-driven, tech-savvy and be very clear on candidate expectations. Diana and her team at Boozt use tools to achieve success through structured hiring processes. They automate workflows for consistency and ensure they maintain a high level of transparency with their candidates throughout the hiring process.

> We use automation not just to save time, but to build trust. When a candidate feels informed and respected, it makes a huge difference.

### The importance of employer branding and candidate experience

Having a strong employer brand and a positive candidate experience will make a huge difference, no matt
highlights:
Mastering tech recruitment | Teamtailor

Jun 19, 2025

# Mastering tech recruitment

Valentina Behrouzi

I'm Val, one of the Marketing Managers here at Teamtailor, responsible for our Global marketing. I love talking about candidate experience and how we can strive to make hiring more inclusive.

In our latest episode of Happy Recruiting, we spoke with Diana Rose, Talent Acquisition Specialist at Boozt, for an in-depth conversation on tech recruiting. Why is there such a high demand, why is tech recruiting so unique and where does candidate experience come in? We break down some of the key takeaways below!

### The demand for tech talent

Tech now touches every industry, whether it’s healthcare or e-commerce, the growing demand for tech professionals is fueled by digital transformation, AI, data, and the need for cross-functional skills. Businesses are no longer just interested in purely technical expertise. They expect their developers, engineers and product managers to understand the goals and strategies of the business.

> It's not just about technical skills anymore. Companies want professionals who can bridge tech and business.

### Why is tech recruiting so unique?

Diana stresses the importance of recruiters hiring for tech roles needing a deep understanding of how technology is evolving, unlike some traditional recruitment methods. Recruiters must be data-driven, tech-savvy and be very clear on candidate expectations. Diana and her team at Boozt use tools to achieve success through structured hiring processes. They automate workflows for consistency and ensure they maintain a high level of transparency with their candidates throughout the hiring process.

> We use automation not just to save time, but to build trust. When a candidate feels informed and respected, it makes a huge difference.
